meaning: n.古物,古董adj.古时的,过时的
examples: This isn't a genuine antique—you've been done.
They were trying to palm the table off as a genuine antique.
Antique Pu'er tea commands the highest prices.
Try the Museo del Juguete Antiguo Mexico (MUJAM), or Mexican Antique Toy Museum.
Serdar Ogecan's antiques at faik pasa yokusu 21 features exquisite and whimsical antique lighting and furniture.
